# PhonePe HDFC Bank  
Credit Cards
The best of UPI in a Credit Card

## Amazing Benefits
PhonePe Ultimo
PhonePe Uno

10% Reward Points
on PhonePe spends
like Recharge, Bill Payments, Flight Booking, Hotel & more*.

on Flipkart, Amazon, Swiggy, Zomato, Uber, Myntra & AJIO

On Scan and Pay
payments through any UPI app*

8 
Complimentary Airport Lounge Access
within India per year*

1%
waiver on fuel surcharge
worry-free fuel spends*

*T&C Apply

Earn ₹50 for your next 10 UPI payments on PhonePe via this card*

1
Enter Details on PhonePe App
2
Complete KYC with HDFC Card
